objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=50)
- adx(period=21)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 25
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 25
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.5
tp_atr_mult: 3.5
description: ATR stop-loss (1.5x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Using Donchian channel and ADX for breakout strategy with added risk management through ATR.

code.validation_error: [IND001] Usage invalide: indicators['donchian']['donchian'] — sous-clé inconnue. Sous-clés valides: lower, middle, upper.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] The strategy uses Donchian channel and ADX for breakout strategy with added risk management through ATR. It has been tested on the AAVEUSDC 1h data (13084 bars). The entry long is when close price crosses above the middle band of the Donchian Channel, while exit occurs if either the cross_any(close,donchian.middle) OR adx.adx<20 conditions are met. Possible weaknesses include potential false breakouts and overfitting due to specific market conditions. If results are poor (negative return), I would change period settings for indicators like Donchian channel or ADX to see if it improves performance. For mediocre returns, adjusting TP/SL multiplier values might help. In case this strategy fails, I could try a different approach that combines more than two trend following strategies.

iterations.hypothesis: A combination of Donchian band with ATR based stop loss and ADX for trend strength results in a robust trading strategy in cryptocurrencies.
Combining Bollinger bands with Donchian channels and ADX can effectively identify breakout opportunities while filtering out low-quality trades by ensuring a strong trend is present.
